name: Chipotle Hasenpfeffer
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Vinegar (a little less if using lots of a sour chipotle sauce like Buffalo)
1 1.5 cups Water or 1 1.25 cups water and 0.25 cup white wine
Chipotle sauce or puree to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large pan.
2. When hot, add bay leaf, garlic clove, spice clove, bacon, carrots, and mushrooms.
3. Add rabbit pieces and sauté until browned.
4. Pour the solution of 1/2 cup vinegar, chipotle sauce, and water/wine over the meat.
5. Cover the pan and simmer until tender.
6. Before turning off the heat, add sour cream and additional chipotle puree if desired.
7. Serve hot with dumplings or large noodles.
I like this dish with about a teaspoon of Dijon mustard in the final sauce.
